docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY ARNOLD, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZEL, ENT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2002 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
